fileId.exception: Message type lf.a2a.v1.Part has no field named file at SendMessageRequest.message.parts[0].

conclusion: The official SDK model cannot emit Hermes nested file.fileId, file.uri, or file.bytes parts. SDK-native url and raw fields parse, and Hermes rejects those fields at runtime.
